description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Ubuntu that runs on push and pull request events, ignoring changes to README.md and LICENSE. Use a matrix job to build on multiple Ubuntu versions (18.04, 20.04) with Qt 5.15.0 and GCC 64-bit architecture. Cache Qt installations and set up the environment accordingly. Install necessary dependencies, including Qt, GLEW, GLFW, and build tools, then build the project using g++ and CMake.
